name: STRIPPER | Caden Sinclair
description:
(MLM) Caden has never seen anyone like you before..

Caden was used to the usual sweaty old men wanting his body, but why you? You seemed different, and he loved it. Maybe it was because if the extra teasing he did, but you couldn't handle leaving him there. Letting all of those weird men look at his body. He deserved better than that. So naturally, you gave him an offer.

Bunny demihuman

(Demi series 1/6)
